title: Add robustness details to TDMA spec in 02a-coordinated-capacity.md (project-LICHEN-ve27.3 codereview-pass3-robustness)
description: Expand TDMA section with: SFN wrap modulo arithmetic details, multi-root beacon conflict resolution, full desync recovery state machine with transitions and timers, handling of RPL version changes during join/drift, precise interaction with time-provider (epoch_floor, stratum, wall_clock_valid). Use strict IETF style (MUST/SHOULD per RFC2119). Perform in small chunks. After EVERY edit chunk, run codereview 3 times by filing codereview beads. Do not close main task until 3 full passes with no P0-P2 findings. End with bd ready --limit 5. See AGENTS.md for review loop.
close_reason: Completed TDMA robustness details in 02a-coordinated-capacity.md across 3 chunks with mandatory 3x codereview passes per chunk (9+ beads filed; P0-P2 addressed in subsequent edits, final passes P3 only). Spec now includes full IETF-style FSM table, SFN modulo with examples/boundaries, multi-root/RPL version/drift/join interactions, time-provider integration with epoch_floor/stratum/wall_clock_valid and init ordering. Updated references and test vector requirements. 3 passes complete.
